name: Ricotta Gnocchi
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Roll the dough into pencil-like ropes about 3/4 inch thick.
3. Drop the gnocchi into boiling salted water.
4. Let cook until they float to the top.
5. Remove with a slotted spoon.
6. Toss gently with your favorite sauce.
7. Top with Romano cheese. Serves 8.
